'''Tosruk''' was a house servant of [[Rostek Horn]]. He was a small, wiry [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with olive skin and brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. He worked for the [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] government, although his true loyalty was to Horn.<ref name="I, Jedi" />

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
